snippet.title: GUH - POCEO OD NULE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH
AranŇĺman: @jonezr
Mix i Master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @jovanradoviic
Directed by: GUH, @jovanradoviic
Video Edit & Post Production: @jovanradoviic
https://www.instagram.com/jovanradoviic‚Äč‚Äč

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

snippet.title: Podcast Inkubator #590 - Marko i Hambi
snippet.description:
https://www.facebook.com/XiaomiHrvatska

Tlo se nakon razornog potresa u srediŇ°njoj Hrvatskoj zatreslo viŇ°e od 1000 puta.
Svako novo podrhtavanje tla donosi novi nemir, a slińćan efekt u ovim napetim vremenima moŇĺe izazvati i vibracija mobitela.
Zato ugasi vibru i preuzmi Smirilicu, umirujuńáu melodiju zvona nastalu smirivanjem vibracija samog potresa.
Smiri sebe i okolinu, preuzmi Smirilicu i doniraj za potresom pogońĎena podruńćja, a viŇ°e saznaj ovdje: https://www.cinipravustvar.hr/smirilica 

Na crveni kauńć stiŇĺe jedan od najpopularnijih gostiju u Podcast Inkubatoru - poznati boksańćki i MMA trener, ali i legenda naŇ°ih druŇ°tvenih mreŇĺa, Goran Babińá - Hamby. On i Petrak ńáe analizirati sve aktualno na borilańćkoj sceni, te ńáe ekskluzivno najaviti i novi projekt koji bi od 1.5. trebao krenuti na kanalu Podcast Inkubatora

hr.title: Navijańćki kompleksi | Tko ńáe ińái na Dianinu zabavu!?
hr.description:
Diana i njezin navijańćki tim jako su uznemireni jer misle da imaju puno kompleksa. Kako bi provjerili tko poznaje kompleks za djevojke, oni odrŇĺavaju natjeńćaj za najbolji crteŇĺ navijańćice, a tko ńáe pobijediti, otińái ńáe na zabavu u Dianinu kuńáu. Tko ńáe pobijediti na natjeńćaju za crtanje? Tko ńáe ińái na Dianinu zabavu? Pogledajte ovaj video!
Pretplatite se na kanal! ūüĎ©‚ÄćūüĎ©‚ÄćūüĎ¶‚ÄćūüĎ¶

Hey if you're reading this, thanks for checking out the description. Sorry that I've been gone for awhile, but don't worry I've still been working hard. Thanks again for reading and have a day!!!

snippet.title: Do we Need Nuclear Energy to Stop Climate Change?
snippet.description:
The first 1000 people to use this link will get a free trial of Skillshare: 
https://skl.sh/kurzgesagtinanutshell05211

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sourcesclimatenuclear/

Do we need nuclear energy to stop climate change? More and more voices from science, environmental activists and the press have been saying so in recent years ‚Äď but this comes as a shock to those who are fighting against nuclear energy and the problems that come with it. So who is right? Well - it is complicated.

Keep Up with the Kardashian-Jenner fam as they build business empires, face personal challenges, and share ups and downs together. The Kardashian-Jenner clan continue to overcome it all through their unwavering love and commitment to each other.

snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In Select Theaters May and on Netflix May 21.

From filmmaker Zack Snyder (300, Watchmen, Zack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League), ARMY OF THE DEAD takes place following a zombie outbreak that has left Las Vegas in ruins and walled off from the rest of the world. When Scott Ward (Dave Bautista), a former zombie war hero who‚Äôs now flipping burgers on the outskirts of the town he now calls home, is approached by casino boss Bly Tanaka (Hiroyuki Sanada), it‚Äôs with the ultimate proposition: break into the zombie-infested quarantine zone to retrieve $200 million sitting in a vault beneath the strip before the city is nuked by the government in 32 hours. With little left to lose, Ward takes on the challenge, assembling a ragtag team of experts for the heist. With a ticking clock, a notoriously impenetrable vault, and a smarter, faster horde of Alpha zombies closing in, only one thing‚Äôs for certain in the greatest heist ever attempted: survivors take all.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Omari Hardwick, Ana de la Reguera, Theo Rossi, Matthias Schweigh√∂fer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Tig Notaro, Ra√ļl Castillo, Huma Qureshi, Samantha Win, Michael Cassidy, Richard Cetrone, and Garret Dillahunt.

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/29qBUt7

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix 
https://youtube.com/Netflix

After a zombie outbreak in Las Vegas, a group of mercenaries takes the ultimate gamble by venturing into the quarantine zone for the greatest heist ever.

snippet.title: Customizing a JUMBO Nesting Doll Set
snippet.description:
Hey guys! Today I am going to be painting on and customizing a set of Russian nesting dolls (or matryoshka dolls). Ever since I painted on my firt set of dolls, you guys have been requesting that I do it again, so I was really excited to finally decorate these and add my own style to them. It's a different type of doll customization haha. This was a really fun art project to do, I highly recommend it if you are looking for creative activities to do. There is so much potential to do all kinds of different characters with these and create a completely original set. 

These are really awesome collectibles and make for such cool home decor. I could definitely see myself building a collection of them. They're also really fun to take apart and put back together lol

Here are the nesting dolls I have (affiliate links):

The one I painted last time: https://amzn.to/2A4LzXy‚Äč
The one I painted this time: https://amzn.to/375JM0E‚Äč
*make sure to tag me on instagram if you paint your own!!!

*LAST CHANCE for the Rubik's Cube pre-order. Don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh ūüėā ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

Currently have 15,000+ unread messages just in this folder. SORRY PEEPS!*

en.description:
Hey guys! Today I am going to be painting on and customizing a set of Russian nesting dolls (or matryoshka dolls). Ever since I painted on my firt set of dolls, you guys have been requesting that I do it again, so I was really excited to finally decorate these and add my own style to them. It's a different type of doll customization haha. This was a really fun art project to do, I highly recommend it if you are looking for creative activities to do. There is so much potential to do all kinds of different characters with these and create a completely original set. 

These are really awesome collectibles and make for such cool home decor. I could definitely see myself building a collection of them. They're also really fun to take apart and put back together lol

Here are the nesting dolls I have (affiliate links):

The one I painted last time: https://amzn.to/2A4LzXy‚Äč
The one I painted this time: https://amzn.to/375JM0E‚Äč
*make sure to tag me on instagram if you paint your own!!!

*LAST CHANCE for the Rubik's Cube pre-order. Don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh ūüėā ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

CREATE THIS BOOK 2:
https://amzn.to/2Nx2G9f

ME Custom Merchandise:
https://moriahelizabethmerch.com/

ME Pin & Sticker Shop:
https://me-merch.myshopify.com

ME Printed Apparel and Accessories:
https://moriah-elizabeth.teespring.com/


____ME SOCIALS____

INSTAGRAM: 
https://www.instagram.com/moriahelizabethofficial/

TIKTOK:
https://www.tiktok.com/@me.moriah.elizabeth

FACEBOOK:
https://www.facebook.com/Moriah-Elizabeth-102592864903627

SNAPCHAT:
MoriahOfficial

VISIT ME WEBSITE:
https://www.moriahelizabeth.com/


____CONTACT ME____

EMAIL PICTURES OF YOUR ART (Create This Book or Fan art only please):
Artwork@Moriah.video

FOR BUSINESS INQUIRIES/OPPORTUNITIES ONLY:
moriah@nightmedia.co


_____MAIL ME_____

For sending squishies, Letters, or general fan mail, please contact: FANMAIL@MORIAH.VIDEO to request my P.O. box address 
(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages. Currently have 15,000+ unread messages just in this folder. SORRY PEEPS!*

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO SA RR - LEA STANKOVIC : JAKO SAM TESKA I POVUCENA OSOBA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Lea Stankovic! Kakav je bio njen pocetak na youtubeu, ko u poslu moze najvise da je iznervira i ko je Lea kada se ugase kamere, saznacete u danasnjoj epizodi.
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

WIIP: https://wiip.rs

Pavlezi: https://www.instagram.com/pavlezi.mp3/

snippet.title: Film Theory: Did Disney STEAL Finding Nemo?
snippet.description:
Never miss a Film Theory! ‚Ėļ http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH¬† ¬†

Disney is infamous for keeping a tight hold on it's copyright, including taking it to extremes with things that TECHNICALLY fall under public domain in their original format. Well, that is not what happened with Finding Nemo. You see, the story of Finding Nemo is VERY similar to a not as well known children's story. One that is NOT in the public domain. Today, Theorists, we are going to dive deep and figure out if Disney actually STOLE the story of Finding Nemo!

Get yourself some Theory Wear! ‚Ėļ¬†https://bit.ly/3bZzn9t
Don't miss a Film Theory! ‚Ėļ http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH ¬†

Disney is infamous for keeping a tight hold on it's copyright, including taking it to extremes with things that TECHNICALLY fall under public domain in their original format. Well, that is not what happened with Finding Nemo. You see, the story of Finding Nemo is VERY similar to a not as well known children's story. One that is NOT in the public domain. Today, Theorists, we are going to dive deep and figure out if Disney actually STOLE the story of Finding Nemo!

Get yourself some Theory Wear! ‚Ėļ¬†https://bit.ly/3bZzn9t
Don't miss a Film Theory! ‚Ėļ http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH ¬†

#FindingNemo #Pixar #Disney #Disney+ #DisneyTheory #PixarTheory #Theory #FilmTheory #Matpat

Need Royalty Free Music for your Content? Try Epidemic Sound.
Get Your 30 Day Free Trial Now ‚Ėļ http://share.epidemicsound.com/TheFilmTheorists

MORE FILM THEORIES

How PICKLE RICK Functions! ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ‚Ėļ https://bit.ly/2JvU4fT
Blair Witch's SECRET DANGER! ¬†‚Ėļ https://bit.ly/2qhmv7a

snippet.title: Najmisteriozniji Sluńćaj Medicine: Nakon 40 Godina Se Probudili
snippet.description:
Zapratite me putem instagrama: https://www.instagram.com/milnovic

Od 1917 do 1927 godine, doŇ°lo je do misteriozne bolesti koja predstavlja neuroloŇ°ki poremeńáaj povezan sa Parkinsonovom boleŇ°ńáu koji je ljude pretvarao gotovo u statue, tańćnije ljude bi ostavio u stanje ‚Äúspavanja‚ÄĚ i to decenijama. Zamislite ovi ljudi bi decenijama bili skamenjeni, ne bi mogli da se pomere. Ovaj video govori kako treba da volimo Ňĺivot koji nam je dat, i da treba da ga ńćuvamo.

snippet.title: Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death
snippet.description:
'Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death'

The Queen has returned to royal duties, just a few days after the death of the Duke of Edinburgh.

The monarch hosted a ceremony to mark the retirement of her household‚Äôs most senior official, the Earl Peel.

The Lord Chamberlain oversees all senior appointments in the household.

The engagement was recorded in the Court Circular ‚Äď a daily list of the events attended by the Royal Family.

The royals are observing two weeks of royal mourning, with members of the family continuing ‚Äúappropriate‚ÄĚ engagements. 

Returning to her official role so soon after her bereavement typifies the Queen‚Äôs deep sense of duty.

#TheQueen #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: HAJDUK vs OSIJEK 0:1 (29.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
U derbi utakmici 29. kola HT Prve lige Osijek je posve zasluŇĺeno osvojio sva tri boda na Poljudu. S 1:0 svladao je Hajduk golom Miereza, najboljeg strijelca Lige.

U prvom poluvremenu se igralo ravnopravno, ali je bilo vidljivo kako su Osjeńćani u svakoj situaciji malo brŇĺi, ńćvrŇ°ńái i odluńćniji. Krajem prvog poluvremena sva opasnost se preselila u splitski Ň°esnaesterac, a Ň°anse za uvodni gol su propustili Mierez, Bohar i Bońćkaj.

No, splitska mreŇĺa se zatresla odmah na startu drugog dijela kada je glavom krasno, s deset metara, pogodio Ramon Mierez. Bio je to njegov jubilarni 20. prvenstveni pogodak.

Iako je Hajduk imao zaostatak, straŇ°no je teŇ°ko dolazio u prilike. Veńái je pritisak i tada stvarao Osijek, viŇ°e je prijetio te bio bolji u ostatku susreta. U samom finiŇ°u utakmice Hajduk je primio novi udarac, zbog dva Ňĺuta kartona je iskljuńćen Fossati.

Osijek se tako nakon remija kod Slaven Belupa ovom pobjedom vratio u utrku s Dinamom, dok Hajduk nije iskoristio kiks Gorice te je propustio dodatni pritisak na treńáe mjesto.

HT Prva liga, 29. kolo: Hajduk - Osijek 0:1 (Mierez 48.)

Autorska prava: "BALKAN INFO - Zvanińćni kanal"
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLG5Qu54Q7gywaCeDs5etuQ

*************************************************************

Ako bismo prestali da budemo zavisni od korporacija koji kontroliŇ°u druŇ°tvene mreŇĺe, lakŇ°e bismo mogli da Ň°irimo slobodnu reńć i naŇ°e emisije bi imale mnogo veńái domet.

Kako zajedno moŇĺemo da pobedimo u borbi za istinu? Instalirajte aplikaciju Telegram i pridruŇĺite nam se na https://t.me/tvbalkaninfo

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i Ňĺele da pomognu rad naŇ°e produkcije to mogu uńćiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. Trudińáemo se da ostanemo dosledni naŇ°oj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i Ň°irenju istine bez cenzure.

snippet.title: Ň†koda Octavia RS ‚Äď ńćeŇ°ka limuzina na steroidima ‚Äď Autotest ‚Äď Polovni automobili
snippet.description:
Oktavija RS oduvek se dizajnom odvajala od ostalih sestara iz game. Veńá na prvi pogled je jasno da ispred vas ne stoji obińćna ńćeŇ°ka limuzina, nego njena "zla" rońĎaka izuzetnih voznih sposobnosti. 

ńĆetvrta generacija popularnog Ň†kodinog modela RS nudi se u tri izvedbe: benzin, dizel i hibrid. Mi smo testirali benzinsku varijantu koja ima pogon samo na prednjim tońćkovima ali i ‚ÄěŇ°per‚Äú diferencijal koji obeńáava njihovo vrhunsko prijanjanje. 

Odlińćan infotainment sistem uz koŇĺu i alkantaru svuda oko vas uńćinińáe da se oseńáate zadovoljno i neoptereńáeno, dok ńáe beskompromisne vozne osobine nabaciti i osmeh na lice adrenalinskim zavisnicima. Kako se vozi, pogledajte u naŇ°em najnovijem videu. 

Na sajtu polovniautomobili.com u toku je sajam novih automobila.

snippet.title: UFC 260 Fight Timeline: Miocic vs Ngannou 2
snippet.description:
After their first fight in 2018, Stipe Miocic and Francis Ngannou went down different paths on the road to the rematch. Miocic became embroiled in a trilogy with Daniel Cormier, while Francis Ngannou overcame a disappointing performance at UFC 226 to put on an incredible streak of finishes. Don't miss Miocic vs Ngannou 2 on Saturday, March 27.

snippet.title: This Week I Learned to Find Water in the Forest
snippet.description:
Go to https://buyraycon.com/mikeboyd for 15% off your order.

In this episode I learn to find water in the forest. An ancient bush craft technique, tapping birch trees can produce litres of drinkable hydration if you know how. Please only try this on trees that you own.

Find out more about Birken Tree here: https://birkentree.com/

My name is Mike Boyd and I make videos documenting my process of learning stuff really fast. Subscribe for more upcoming videos and feel free to tell me what you'd like me to learn next in the comments.

snippet.title: Why Hydrogen Cars Flopped
snippet.description:

Hydrogen Fuel Cells were supposed to save the auto industry from climate change, and promised no harmful emissions from the tailpipe, just pure water. So what happened? Why hasn't the hydrogen car taken over the industry in the years since? And what future does this amazing technology have? Well, it's complicated.

snippet.title: Building Thumb Bucket Ep 2 (Berms, rollers, and singletrack!)
snippet.description:
Thumb bucket is Berm Peak's first machine cut mountain bike trail, which when finished will be a blank canvas for crazy features. This series documents us building the trail from bottom to top, from learning how to use a machine, to drainage, to technical difficulties.

Check out Squatch's YouTube Channel https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFpcbXL6wsGrQhUDQgvOGCQ

Check out Joe's YouTube Channel 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCccgqHpyg6ax6dLzBx9yZGA

Berm Peak Hoodies, Beanies, Jerseys, Shirts
https://cognativemtb.com/collections/seths-bike-hacks-collection

Check out our second channel for "express" videos https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOpP5PqrzODWpFU961acUbg

Instagram https://www.instagram.com/sethsbikehacks
Facebook https://www.facebook.com/sethsbikehacks

Music in this video is from 
http://share.epidemicsound.com/trQSg
and https://soundstripe.com?fpr=seth20

snippet.title: NJIH DVE SVAKI DAN PEŇ†KE PREńźU 15km ZAJEDNO:TeŇ°ka Ňĺivotna prińća devojńćice Milice i njenog psa Lare
snippet.description:
Nova epizoda serijala ‚Äě300 ńćuda‚Äú donela je zanimljive prińće o ljubavi i lepoti. Ne kaŇĺu uzalud da je pas najbolji ńćovekov prijatelj. Ta ljubav je neizmerna, jaka i bezuslovna, a vernost psa ne moŇĺe da se meri ni sa ńćim.  U KurŇ°umlijskom planinskom selu Konjuva, svakoga jutra pre zore, Milica Rackov (15) kreńáe peŇ°ke put Ň°kole u susedno selo Barbatovac. Treba peŇ°ańćiti po mrazu, snegu ili kiŇ°i do autobuske stanice, udaljene nekoliko kilometara od kuńáe. Autobusom stiŇĺe do Ň°kole udaljene oko 15 kilometara. snippet.title: Prince Charles: 'My Dear Papa Was a Very Special Person'
snippet.description:
Prince Charles made a short statement outside Highgrove House this afternoon to mark the passing of his father, the Duke of Edinburgh.

The Prince of Wales commented on his father's seven decades of service to Queen and country. He added that: "My family and I will miss him enormously... My dear Papa was a very special person."

#PrinceCharles #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

Against the breathtaking backdrop of the City Of Lights, and from the lush ruins of a vacant but majestic Parisian hotel, Justin Bieber brings his new album Justice to life with five stunning performances, four of them live debuts. This fifteen minute special brings fans directly into Justin‚Äôs world and opens the doors to his powerful new album.

JUSTICE the album out now: https://JustinBieber.lnk.to/Justice

snippet.title: Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode moŇĺete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak prińće o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" prińća o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaŇ°a ńćiji postupci se i dan danas preprińćavaju. Na ńćelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih Ňĺestokih momaka sa naŇ°ih prostora, zańćetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir MagaŇ°, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. Pravińćan, patriota pomalo preke naravi reŇ°avao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anńĎeo ńćuvar dok je za ove druge bio nońána mora, a gnev i jańćinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odlińćno pamtili. ŇĹivotni put Ljubomira MagaŇ°a i druŇĺine koju je okupio oko sebe, moŇĺe se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbriŇĺnih deńćaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovńćega. Saznańáemo na koje sve skrivene i javne nańćine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih dogańĎaja iz njegovog Ňĺivota. ńĆuńáemo i svedońćanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentaristińćkih akcionih filmova.

Posetite naŇ° sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Instagramu: http://bit.ly/PRVAig
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Tviteru: http://bit.ly/PRVAtwitter

snippet.title: Emanet 160. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 160 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: MASSIVE Reese's Puffs Cereal CHALLENGE (6,000+ Cals)
snippet.description:
Go to https://buyraycon.com/stonie for 15% off your order!

Another cereal of the bucket list!! Reese's Puffs!
I knew going into it it'd be one of the more difficult cereal challenges due to how crunchy Reese's Puffs are, but what I didn't expect was the Chocolate & Peanut Butter flavor to be off the charts...

snippet.title: Customizing Many Shoes.
snippet.description:
Hey Guys! Today I am going to be painting and customizing multiple pairs of some plain white vans. Shoes are such a fun item to paint, and I have so many ideas for ways to decorate these. I hope I give you some inspiration for a fun painting project! I love making custom shoes because you can really put your own style on them and make them personal to you (even if you never actually wear them lol). snippet.title: ISTRA 1961 vs HAJDUK 0:1 (28.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
NogometaŇ°i Hajduka vratili su se pobjedama te su u 28. kolu HT Prve lige osvojili tri teŇ°ka boda u Puli protiv Istre 1961 pobjedom 1:0.

Iako su Splińáani od pońćetka imali loptu u posjedu i teŇĺili napadu, prave Ň°anse su bile vrlo rijetke, pogotovo u prvom poluvremenu. Odmah na startu drugog dijela VuŇ°kovińá je ozbiljno zaprijetio, ali je dobro reagirao domańái vratar Luńćińá.

Premda je inicijativa Hajduka bila ońćita, na kraju su gosti za tri boda doslovno ugurali loptu u suparnińćku mreŇĺu. Uńćinio je to u 69. minuti Simińá, nakon jednog od brojnih kornera koje je izveo Kańćaniklińá.

Tek tada je domańáin hrabrije krenuo u napade, a dvije prilike je imao Japanac Hara. Na samom kraju dvoboja domańái kapetan Blagojevińá je dobio drugi Ňĺuti karton i Istra 1961 je ostala bez vaŇĺnih bodova u borbi za ostankom u Ligi.

Hajduk zajedno s Rijekom nastavlja lov na Goricu. Bila je ovo, inańće, treńáa pobjeda Hajduka u sezoni protiv suparnika iz Pule.

HT Prva liga, 28. kolo: Istra 1961 - Hajduk 0:1 (Simińá 69.)

snippet.title: rebirthing : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
‚ÄúI‚Äôve had a lot of lives ‚Äď like my cat, I‚Äôm on my ninth life.‚ÄĚ 
Demi Lovato‚Äôs explosive documentary series comes to a close with revelations about her broken engagement, her return to the studio, and exploration of moderation sobriety as she attempts to let go of her past and moves ahead living her truth. 

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Love Is Respect. Love is more than just the way you feel. Text loveis to 22522 for support and help understanding healthy relationships.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Text: loveis to 22522
Chat Online: www.loveisrespect.org
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

 
Find resources for your path to recovery at the Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

snippet.title: What Color Is My Hoodie?
snippet.description:
Grey? Blue? Purple? It can look different, depending on the context. Let's talk about color perception, color temperature, and the history of laundry.

Atmospheric opacity image from ESA/Hubble (F. Granato): https://www.eso.org/public/images/atm_opacity/ - image licensed under CC by 4.0 - https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

The optical illusion is original, but based on the work of David Novick: https://twitter.com/novickprof/status/1139342022551191553

More on Illuminant D65: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Illuminant_D65 - the references in this article go into the full technical detail

I'm at https://tomscott.com
on Twitter at https://twitter.com/tomscott
on Facebook at https://facebook.com/tomscott
and on Instagram as tomscottgo

snippet.title: Emanet 159. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 159 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Hailey Bieber On The Early Late Night Show | Dixie D'Amelio
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy ‚Äď Trailer 1
snippet.description:
Tunes vs. Goons. Watch LeBron James and Bugs Bunny in the new trailer for Space Jam: A New Legacy. In theaters and streaming on HBO Max ‚Äď July 16. #SpaceJamMovie 

-----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovie‚Äč
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/‚Äč
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/‚Äč
-----------------
Welcome to the Jam!  Basketball champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event ‚ÄúSpace Jam: A New Legacy,‚ÄĚ from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.‚Äôs digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as you‚Äôve never seen them before.  It‚Äôs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBron‚Äôs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even ‚ÄúKing‚ÄĚ James by playing the game their own way.

James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the ‚ÄúAvengers‚ÄĚ films, ‚ÄúHotel Rwanda‚ÄĚ), Khris Davis (‚ÄúJudas and the Black Messiah,‚ÄĚ TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúAtlanta‚ÄĚ), Sonequa Martin-Green (TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúThe Walking Dead,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Trek: Discovery‚ÄĚ), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (‚ÄúLooney Tunes Cartoons‚ÄĚ), Eric Bauza (‚ÄúLooney Tunes Cartoons‚ÄĚ), and Zendaya (upcoming ‚ÄúDune,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúMalcolm & Marie‚ÄĚ).

Lee (‚ÄúGirls Trip,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúNight School‚ÄĚ) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The film‚Äôs producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.

The director‚Äôs behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (‚ÄúSpider-Man: Homecoming‚ÄĚ), animation producer Troy Nethercott (‚ÄúWonder Park‚ÄĚ), production designers Kevin Ishioka (‚ÄúThe Mule‚ÄĚ), Akin McKenzie (Netflix‚Äôs ‚ÄúWhen They See Us‚ÄĚ) and Clint Wallace (upcoming ‚ÄúEternals‚ÄĚ), editor Bob Ducsay (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúStar Wars Episode VIII ‚Äď The Last Jedi‚ÄĚ) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (‚ÄúRampage,‚ÄĚ ‚ÄúWar for the Planet of the Apes‚ÄĚ).  The music is by Kris Bowers (‚ÄúGreenbook,‚ÄĚ Netflix‚Äôs ‚ÄúBridgerton‚ÄĚ).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, ‚ÄúSpace Jam: A New Legacy.‚ÄĚ  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.
